heading: Lien, attachment, garnishment, etc., of transferred property
label: 1631m Lien, attachment, garnishment, etc., of transferred property
text: No property conveyed, transferred, assigned, delivered, or paid to the designee of the President under this subchapter, or the net proceeds thereof, shall be liable to lien, attachment, garnishment, trustee process, or execution, or subject to any order or decree of any court, except as provided in this subchapter.
